10589923.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life
10589923.description: Val and Selasi challenge Paul to bake a delicious pistachio and rose petal roulade. Paul shares his ultimate pizza recipe: a courgette, lemon and thyme bake from Venice.

10590029.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10590029.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

10590448.title: Silent Witness
10590448.description: The accidental fatal shooting of a Polish teenager in an armed police operation triggers a series of murders that link Turkish gangsters, a grieving family and a fractured firearms unit.

10591351.title: Father Brown
10591351.description: Tensions rise when members of a radical anarchist group keep turning up dead after arriving in Kembleford to perform a play in the park.

10591523.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10591523.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

10591948.title: Impossible
10591948.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

10592373.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10592373.description: A local criminal, Billy `The Brick' Porters is the subject of the village's suspicion when the mayor of Arden is found murdered in his cottage in the dead of night. Lu and Frank try to exonerate criminal.

10592581.title: Bargain Hunt
10592581.description: Charlie Ross presents from the British Motor Museum in Gaydon, Warwickshire. Former Formula One world champion Damon Hill talks to Charlie about a very special car, whilst the reds and blues motor around the fair with the help of experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant.

10593005.title: Bad Move
10593005.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

10593383.title: Keeping Up Appearances
10593383.description: Holding a riverside picnic seems like a good idea, but Hyacinth's arrangements don't go quite as she planned.

10593493.title: Doctors
10593493.description: It's the day of the charity car wash. Luca, Ruhma and Karen have to go the extra mile for their customers.

10593881.title: EastEnders
10593881.description: Jack has bad news for Stuart and Rainie. Bobby impresses Dana with Zack's help, Isaac's suspicion firmly takes hold, and Callum digs himself deeper as Ben makes a discovery.

10594967.title: Mary Berry Cooks
10594967.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

10595894.title: Bargain Hunt
10595894.description: At the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire, a father and daughter take on a mother and daughter to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, and they all have their sights set on a golden gavel. One team falls in love with a handmade dolls house while the other team sets sights on a pair of Edwardian glass eyes. Also, Anita travels to Sheffield, famous for its cutlery industry, to uncover the story of some pioneering women: the infamous Buffer Girls.

10596070.title: Doctors
10596070.description: It's the day of the charity car wash. Luca, Ruhma and Karen have to go the extra mile for their customers.

10597039.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10597039.description: Frank and Lu investigate death threats made against a former soap star who's about to stage her return to the limelight.

10597437.title: Mary Berry Cooks
10597437.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

10597568.description: Val and Selasi challenge Paul to bake a delicious pistachio and rose petal roulade. Paul shares his ultimate pizza recipe: a courgette, lemon and thyme bake from Venice.

10597904.title: Bad Move
10597904.description: Nicky and Steve's move to their dream house in the country is rapidly turning into a nightmare because they cannot get connected to the internet.

10598031.title: Keeping Up Appearances
10598031.description: Richard is not exactly over the moon with his birthday present, but that is only the start of a series of problems.

10598896.title: Impossible
10598896.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

10599092.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
10599092.description: The show reaches its climax as the three finalists enter the sewing room for the very last time. The sewing experts must decide who will take the title of Britain's best amateur sewer as they set three tough `couture' themed challenges.

10599847.title: Casualty
10599847.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.

10600007.title: Doctor Who
10600007.description: Intelligence agents around the world are under attack from alien forces, so MI6 turn to the only people who can help: the Doctor and friends. As they travel the globe looking for answers, attacks come from all sides. Earth's security rests on the team's shoulders, but where will this planet-threatening conspiracy lead them?

10600486.title: Bad Move
10600486.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

10600855.title: Bad Move
10600855.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

10600948.title: Ordinary Lies
10600948.description: Fletch and wife Caz are the rock-solid office couple. However, when Caz oversteps the mark sending Fletch on a downward spiral, he wonders if she really is the right woman for him.

10601387.title: Casualty
10601387.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.
